name: teamId
label: Team
help: Select a team from your Renderbase account

name: workspaceId
label: Workspace
help: Select a workspace within the selected team

name: templateId
label: Excel Template
help: Select an Excel template from the selected workspace

name: variables
label: Template Variables
help: Variables defined in your template. Fields are loaded dynamically based on the selected template.

name: fileName
label: File Name
help: Custom file name without the .xlsx extension. Defaults to the template name if not provided.

name: waitForCompletion
label: Wait for Completion
help: If enabled, the module waits until the Excel file is fully generated. Disable for async processing.
